C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc libgameengine.a CMakeFiles/gameengine.dir/src/Behaviours.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/gameengine.dir/src/DeltaTime.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/gameengine.dir/src/Managers.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/gameengine.dir/src/Systems.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/gameengine.dir/libraries/graphicslib/src/Camera.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/gameengine.dir/libraries/graphicslib/src/Mesh.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/gameengine.dir/libraries/graphicslib/src/Renderer.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/gameengine.dir/libraries/graphicslib/src/Shader.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/gameengine.dir/libraries/graphicslib/src/Texture.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/gameengine.dir/libraries/graphicslib/src/Window.cpp.obj
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ranlib.exe libgameengine.a
